name: ERPSMART Builder Form Layout Contract
purpose: Define draft form layout metadata edited by Builder Studio and later consumed by a future runtime renderer.
rules: fields must reference definition.fields by field name
section IDs should be stable because stepper steps reference them
stepper sectionIds must reference formLayout.sections IDs
conditions targetField must reference a definition field name
metadata must not imply runtime rendering until the renderer exists
raw JSON remains available for debugging and recovery
agent_notes: AI Builder Agent may propose formLayout metadata changes.
AI Builder Agent must call validate and preview after proposed changes.
AI Builder Agent must not implement runtime form rendering or publish from this metadata without a separate approved task.
